    Field
    Description
    static final PotFont
    PotFont.BODY
    A font configuration suitable for standard body text.
    static final PotFont
    PotFont.CODE
    A font configuration suitable for displaying source code.
    static final PotFont
    PotFont.DEFAULT
    The default font configuration.
    static final PotFont
    PotFont.SUBTITLE
    A font configuration suitable for subtitles.

    Methods in cc.quaternion.potshaper that return PotFont
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PotFont
    PotFont.bold()
    Returns a new font configuration with the bold property set to true.
    PotFont
    PotFont.bold(boolean bold)
    Returns a new font configuration with the specified bold property, preserving all other properties.
    PotFont
    PotFont.color(PotColor color)
    Returns a new font configuration with the specified text color, preserving all other properties.
    static PotFont
    PotFont.create()
    Creates a new font configuration with all default properties.
    static PotFont
    PotFont.family(String family)
    Creates a new font configuration with the specified family, using the default size.
    PotFont
    PotFont.italic()
    Returns a new font configuration with the italic property set to true.
    PotFont
    PotFont.italic(boolean italic)
    Returns a new font configuration with the specified italic property, preserving all other properties.
    static PotFont
    PotFont.of(String family, double size)
    Creates a new font configuration with the specified family and size.
    static PotFont
    PotFont.size(double size)
    Creates a new font configuration with the specified size, using the default family.
    PotFont
    PotFont.strikethrough()
    Returns a new font configuration with the strikethrough property set to true.
    PotFont
    PotFont.strikethrough(boolean strikethrough)
    Returns a new font configuration with the specified strikethrough property, preserving all other properties.
    PotFont
    PotFont.underline()
    Returns a new font configuration with the underline property set to true.
    PotFont
    PotFont.underline(boolean underline)
    Returns a new font configuration with the specified underline property, preserving all other properties.
    PotFont
    PotFont.withCharacterSpacing(double spacing)
    Returns a new font configuration with the specified character spacing, preserving all other properties.
    PotFont
    PotFont.withColor(PotColor color)
    Returns a new font configuration with the specified text color, preserving all other properties.
    PotFont
    PotFont.withFamily(String family)
    Returns a new font configuration with the specified family, preserving all other properties.
    PotFont
    PotFont.withLanguage(String language)
    Returns a new font configuration with the specified language tag, preserving all other properties.
    PotFont
    PotFont.withSize(double size)
    Returns a new font configuration with the specified size, preserving all other properties.
    Methods in cc.quaternion.potshaper with parameters of type PotFont
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PotShape
    PotShape.font(PotFont font)
    Applies multiple font properties from a PotFont object to all text runs.
    PotTableCell
    PotTableCell.font(PotFont font)
    Applies multiple font properties from a PotFont object to all text runs within the cell.
    PotTextBox
    PotTextBox.font(PotFont font)
    Applies a comprehensive font configuration from a PotFont object.
